phases.objective: Complete read-only DB precheck evidence for KPIONE monthly transition without writes.
phases.entry_gate: Branch lab/FAST_REFORM_016_kpione_monthly_db_precheck_read_only at main@986d4b0; DB_URL_CODEX_RO only if DB is touched.
phases.exit_gate: Evidence is aggregate, read-only guardrails pass, discrepancy and NO_SOURCE_SIGNAL caveats are documented.
phases.writes_allowed: Repo-only evidence/script/test writes already authorized for 016; no DB writes.
phases.authorization_required: Bastian/ChatGPT explicit authorization for any additional file outside 016 scope.

phases.objective: Patch 016 evidence gaps and rerun controlled read-only validation.
phases.entry_gate: 016 audit findings accepted and patch scope explicitly authorized.
phases.exit_gate: Historical count discrepancy documented and NO_SOURCE_SIGNAL cannot be confused with FRESH.
phases.writes_allowed: Repo evidence/script/test updates only; no DB writes.

phases.objective: Design exact overlap/idempotency subphase using persisted identities or safe staging contract.
phases.exit_gate: Exact comparison strategy is documented with cost, indexes, and no row-level export.

phases.objective: Close pre-apply readiness decision for KPIONE June plan.
phases.exit_gate: Apply is either blocked with evidence or promoted to 017A with gates.

phases.objective: Prepare apply design and rollback design without execution.
phases.exit_gate: Apply/rollback plan is auditable and no execution has occurred.

phases.objective: Implement apply runner or staging mechanism under no-apply guardrails.
phases.exit_gate: Runner/tests exist and default to no-apply.
phases.writes_allowed: Repo code/tests/evidence only; no DB writes.

phases.objective: Dry-run apply rehearsal and final apply readiness gate.
phases.exit_gate: Dry-run evidence proves scope, idempotency, rollback path, and safety gates.

phases.objective: Execute approved productive apply only if separately authorized.
phases.entry_gate: 017C readiness accepted and explicit productive apply authorization granted.
phases.exit_gate: Apply result, rollback readiness, and post-apply validation documented.
phases.writes_allowed: DB writes only if exact command, role, phase, rollback, and confirmation are authorized.

phases.objective: Post-apply trial, monitoring, and final transition decision.
phases.entry_gate: 018 apply completed or explicitly skipped with evidence.
phases.exit_gate: Trial outcome accepted; deferred retention/destructive topics may be reconsidered only after this phase.
phases.writes_allowed: Monitoring/evidence; destructive actions remain disallowed unless a new directive amendment exists.
phases.authorization_required: Explicit 019 reprompt and any separate production authorization.

deviation_requires_directive_amendment.rule: Any deviation from the locked sequence, active phase, allowed next phase, deferred topics, or destructive-action ban requires an explicit amendment to this directive before work continues.

hard_restrictions: No SQL execution for this roadmap-lock patch
